description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with a postgres:latest service and a pip cache at ~/.cache/pip/. Define a global POSTGRES_DB variable set to ci and a before_script that prints the Python version and installs dependencies via pip install -r requirements.txt. Add a test job (default stage) that sets a DATABASE_URL variable to postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/$POSTGRES_DB and runs python manage.py test --settings gitlab_ci_example_django.settings.ci. The pipeline has no explicit stages, artifacts, or rules.
